changeSet.author: cinex
cinex
changeSet.sql: -- TWO_D: 10×12 = 120 vị trí -- VIP zone C-G × 4-9, COUPLE row J, HANDICAP B1/B12, aisle cols 4 và 9 INSERT INTO seats (room_id, row_label, col_number, seat_number, seat_type, status, is_aisle, storage_state, version, created_at, updated_at) SELECT r.id, CHAR(65 + rn.idx), cn.num, CHAR(65 + rn.idx) + CAST(cn.num AS NVARCHAR), CASE WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) = 'B' AND cn.num IN (1, 12) THEN 'HANDICAP' WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) = 'J' THEN 'COUPLE' WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) BETWEEN 'C' AND 'G' AND cn.num BETWEEN 4 AND 9 THEN 'VIP' ELSE 'STANDARD' END, 'AVAILABLE', CASE WHEN cn.num IN (4, 9) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 'ACTIVE', 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() FROM rooms r CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 10 idx = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) - 1 FROM sys.all_objects) rn CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 12 num = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) FROM sys.all_objects) cn WHERE r.type = 'TWO_D' AND r.storage_state = 'ACTIVE';

changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: -- THREE_D: 10×12, VIP zone rộng hơn (kính 3D đắt) — C-H × 3-10 INSERT INTO seats (room_id, row_label, col_number, seat_number, seat_type, status, is_aisle, storage_state, version, created_at, updated_at) SELECT r.id, CHAR(65 + rn.idx), cn.num, CHAR(65 + rn.idx) + CAST(cn.num AS NVARCHAR), CASE WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) = 'B' AND cn.num IN (1, 12) THEN 'HANDICAP' WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) = 'J' THEN 'COUPLE' WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) BETWEEN 'C' AND 'H' AND cn.num BETWEEN 3 AND 10 THEN 'VIP' ELSE 'STANDARD' END, 'AVAILABLE', CASE WHEN cn.num IN (4, 9) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 'ACTIVE', 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() FROM rooms r CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 10 idx = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) - 1 FROM sys.all_objects) rn CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 12 num = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) FROM sys.all_objects) cn WHERE r.type = 'THREE_D' AND r.storage_state = 'ACTIVE';

changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: -- IMAX: 14×18, VIP D-J × 5-14, DELUXE F/G (override VIP), HANDICAP C1/C18, aisle 5/14 INSERT INTO seats (room_id, row_label, col_number, seat_number, seat_type, status, is_aisle, storage_state, version, created_at, updated_at) SELECT r.id, CHAR(65 + rn.idx), cn.num, CHAR(65 + rn.idx) + CAST(cn.num AS NVARCHAR), CASE WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) = 'C' AND cn.num IN (1, 18) THEN 'HANDICAP' WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) IN ('F', 'G') THEN 'DELUXE' WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) BETWEEN 'D' AND 'J' AND cn.num BETWEEN 5 AND 14 THEN 'VIP' ELSE 'STANDARD' END, 'AVAILABLE', CASE WHEN cn.num IN (5, 14) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 'ACTIVE', 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() FROM rooms r CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 14 idx = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) - 1 FROM sys.all_objects) rn CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 18 num = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) FROM sys.all_objects) cn WHERE r.type = 'IMAX' AND r.storage_state = 'ACTIVE';

changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: -- FOUR_DX: 8×10, VIP C-F × 3-8, HANDICAP B1/B10, aisle col 5 -- KHÔNG có COUPLE/SWEETBOX vì ghế đặc biệt rung/gió INSERT INTO seats (room_id, row_label, col_number, seat_number, seat_type, status, is_aisle, storage_state, version, created_at, updated_at) SELECT r.id, CHAR(65 + rn.idx), cn.num, CHAR(65 + rn.idx) + CAST(cn.num AS NVARCHAR), CASE WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) = 'B' AND cn.num IN (1, 10) THEN 'HANDICAP' WHEN CHAR(65 + rn.idx) BETWEEN 'C' AND 'F' AND cn.num BETWEEN 3 AND 8 THEN 'VIP' ELSE 'STANDARD' END, 'AVAILABLE', CASE WHEN cn.num = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 'ACTIVE', 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() FROM rooms r CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 8 idx = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) - 1 FROM sys.all_objects) rn CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 10 num = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) FROM sys.all_objects) cn WHERE r.type = 'FOUR_DX' AND r.storage_state = 'ACTIVE';

changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: -- Cập nhật total_seats cho mỗi room — đếm seat thật bán được (loại trừ aisle/blocked) UPDATE r SET total_seats = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seats s WHERE s.room_id = r.id AND s.is_aisle = 0 AND s.status != 'BLOCKED' AND s.storage_state = 'ACTIVE' ) FROM rooms r WHERE r.storage_state = 'ACTIVE';
